get.description: This endpoint retrieves the user profile information from the Auth0 Management API using the user's ID from the session. The ID is obtained from the session and used to query the user data from the external identity provider (Auth0). The user must be authenticated, and a valid session must exist.

401.description: Unauthorized if session is missing or invalid

500.description: Internal server error if server fails

patch.description: This endpoint updates the user profile information in the Auth0 Management API using the user's ID from the session. The ID is obtained from the session and used to query the user data from the external identity provider (Auth0). The user must be authenticated, and a valid session must exist. The request body must contain valid JSON data representing the user profile information.

401.description: Unauthorized if session is missing or invalid

404.description: User not found in Auth0 database

500.description: Internal server error if request to Auth0 fails

patch.description: This endpoint uploads the user avatar image to the image storage service and updates the user profile information in the Auth0 Management API using the user's ID from the session. The ID is obtained from the session and used to query the user data from the external identity provider (Auth0). The user must be authenticated, and a valid session must exist. The request body must contain a valid image file.

parameters.description: X coordinate of the crop area
parameters.name: x

parameters.description: Y coordinate of the crop area
parameters.name: y

401.description: Unauthorized if session is missing or invalid

404.description: User not found in Auth0 database

500.description: Internal server error if request to Auth0 fails
